news.title: Weekly Saturday Learning Sessions Continue
news.text: Fun Club continues to support students through English learning, STEM activities, leadership practice, and college readiness.

news.title: Volunteer Opportunities Now Open
news.text: Students and community members can support tutoring, mentoring, event planning, and student activities.

news.title: Fun Club Builds Student Confidence
news.text: Through small-group learning and service projects, students practice communication, teamwork, and leadership.

events.title: Student Learning Session
events.text: English learning, STEM activities, college preparation, and leadership support.

events.title: Volunteer Planning Meeting
events.text: Volunteers plan upcoming lessons, events, projects, and student support activities.

events.title: Community Showcase
events.text: Students will share projects, learning progress, and volunteer impact with families and community members.
